footer.tagline: Freelance marketplace for local and remote work.

hero.title: Hire freelancers for real work—nearby or remote
hero.subtitle: Search live profiles, compare proposals on open jobs, and keep every conversation tied to the brief.
hero.locationNote: City + optional browser location surface nearby talent when freelancers share coordinates.
hero.howStep1: Post a brief or browse the directory.
hero.howStep2: Review proposals and profiles in context.
hero.howStep3: Message and decide without leaving the job thread.
hero.howFootnote: No sign-in required to search—create an account when you are ready to post or send proposals.
hero.searchSubtitle: Real listings · updates with the community
hero.keywordPlaceholder: What do you need? e.g. shoot, edit, tutor…
hero.cityHint: Add a city to bias toward nearby profiles; leave it empty for broader remote results.

jobs.pageDescription: Active client briefs—filter by category, place, and work mode, then open a row for the full scope.
jobs.locationHint: Matches when the job lists a city.
jobs.resultHint: Title + budget at a glance—open for the full brief.
jobs.sidebarBody: Post a brief with budget and location so the right people can send proposals.
jobs.emptyCategoryTitle: No jobs yet in this category
jobs.emptyCategoryBody: Nothing open matches that category right now. The board only shows what clients have actually posted.
jobs.emptyCategoryStep1: Clear category and scan the full board.
jobs.emptyCategoryStep2: Loosen keyword or city if you stacked filters.
jobs.emptyCategoryStep3: Post a brief if you are the one hiring.
jobs.emptyFiltersBody: Early access boards stay sparse—filters are doing their job even when the answer is zero.
jobs.emptyFiltersStep1: Reset work mode to Any, then narrow again.
jobs.emptyFiltersStep2: Drop city if the role might be remote.
jobs.emptyFiltersStep3: Use one keyword from the job title you remember.
jobs.emptyDefaultTitle: No open jobs on the board
jobs.emptyDefaultBody: The public job list is empty until clients post real briefs—there is no demo data behind this view.
jobs.emptyDefaultStep1: Clients: post the first brief with budget and work mode.
jobs.emptyDefaultStep2: Freelancers: browse the directory and polish your profile while jobs ramp up.
jobs.emptyDefaultStep3: Everyone: early access means the feed will move—bookmark and check back.

freelancers.pageDescription: Live profiles—filter by skill, city, and work mode. Turn on nearby when place matters; go remote when it does not.
freelancers.categoryHint: Matches anyone with at least one skill in that category.
freelancers.cityHint: NearWork treats city as a first-class signal for on-site and hybrid work—add yours to discover nearby freelancers.
freelancers.nearbyIdleHint: Optional: allow browser location to prioritize freelancers close to you. City search remains available.
freelancers.nearbyErrorUnsupported: Geolocation is not supported in this browser.
freelancers.nearbyErrorDenied: Location permission denied. You can still search by city.
freelancers.nearbyErrorLookup: Could not determine your location. Try again or use city search.
freelancers.nearbyBannerBody: Within {{radius}} km · closest first. Distance on cards when coordinates exist.
freelancers.cityMatchBody: Profiles mentioning “{{city}}”—pair with work mode to separate remote vs on-site.
freelancers.resultHint: Open a card for the full profile and reviews.
freelancers.emptyCategoryTitle: No freelancers in this category yet
freelancers.emptyCategoryBody: Nobody on the directory lists skills under that category right now—that is a real empty state, not a bug.
freelancers.emptyCategoryStep1: Clear category and try a broader keyword.
freelancers.emptyCategoryStep2: Switch work mode to Any if you over-filtered remote vs on-site.
freelancers.emptyCategoryStep3: Check open jobs if you are hiring instead of browsing talent.
freelancers.emptyFiltersBody: The directory is still growing in early access—tight filters often return zero even when people are signing up.
freelancers.emptyFiltersStep1: Remove city or widen radius if you used nearby.
freelancers.emptyFiltersStep2: Try remote-only for roles that do not need someone on-site.
freelancers.emptyFiltersStep3: Shorten the keyword to one strong term.
freelancers.emptyDefaultBody: When freelancers publish profiles with city and work mode, they show up here automatically—nothing to seed by hand.
freelancers.emptyDefaultStep1: If you are a freelancer, complete your profile and set availability.
freelancers.emptyDefaultStep2: If you are hiring, post a job so proposals can start.
freelancers.emptyDefaultStep3: Come back after early-access invites roll out—this list will move first.

login.title: Log in
login.subtitle: Log in to your account to continue
login.afterSignIn: After sign in, you'll continue to
login.errorGeneric: Could not sign in. Try again.
login.errorNetwork: Could not reach the server. Check your connection, VPN, or ad blockers, then try again.
login.continueClient: Log in to continue to your client dashboard.
login.continueFreelancer: Log in to continue to your freelancer dashboard.
login.continueMessages: Log in to continue to your messages.
login.continueNotifications: Log in to continue to your notifications.
login.continueSettings: Log in to continue to your settings.
login.continueAdmin: Log in to continue to internal admin.

registerForm.title: Create your account
registerForm.subtitle: Join NearWork to hire or get hired
registerForm.afterCreate: After you create your account, we'll take you back to

login.saveJob: Log in to save this job.
login.saveFreelancer: Log in to save this freelancer.
login.sendMessage: Log in to message on NearWork.
login.submitBid: Log in to submit your bid.
login.postJob: Log in to post a job.
login.protected: Log in to continue to that page.

register.postJob: Create a client account to post a job.
register.submitBid: Create a freelancer account to submit your bid.
register.saveFreelancer: Create an account to save freelancers and revisit them later.
register.saveJob: Create an account to save jobs and track opportunities.
register.sendMessage: Create an account to start messaging.
